_comment: Base hyperparameter config for synthrad2025-multitask. Anatomy-specific files in configs/anatomy/ override keys as needed.

_notes.LAMBDA_PERCEPTUAL: Must remain 1. Previous value of 5 caused MRI→CT SSIM to drop from 0.85 → 0.70. Applied to BOTH synthesis directions.
_notes.LAMBDA_PAIRED_MR2CT: Must equal LAMBDA_PAIRED_CT2MR. Asymmetry caused training instability in prior runs.
_notes.LAMBDA_ANATOMY: Anatomy consistency weight for MRI→CT direction (seg_fake_CT vs seg_real_MR).
_notes.LAMBDA_ANATOMY_CT2MR: Anatomy consistency weight for CT→MRI direction (seg_fake_MR vs seg_real_CT). Set to 0 to ablate.
_notes.SEG_WARMUP_EPOCHS: During warmup (epoch < SEG_WARMUP_EPOCHS) only seg and paired losses are active; GAN / cycle losses start at epoch >= SEG_WARMUP_EPOCHS.
_notes.MR2CT_SSIM_FLOOR: Best-model guard: model is saved only when mr2ct_ssim >= this floor.
_notes.CT2MR_SSIM_FLOOR: Symmetric guard: model is saved only when ct2mr_ssim >= this floor. Lower than MR2CT (CT→MRI is harder).
_notes.MEAN_DICE_FLOOR: Segmentation guard on best_model.pth: 0.0 = disabled. E.g. set 0.4 to prevent saving models with collapsed segmentation.
_notes.CLASS_WEIGHTS: Per-class CE weights for SegLoss, length=num_classes. null = uniform. Use inverse-freq weighting for small organs (e.g. pancreas).
_notes.DEEP_SUPERVISION_WEIGHTS: Loss weights for auxiliary heads [aux_128x128, aux_256x256_pre_refine]. Scaled relative to main loss (e.g. [0.2, 0.4]).
_notes.DECAY_EPOCH: LR linear decay starts at this epoch and reaches 0 by epoch EPOCHS.
